faqs.q: How do I apply for a job at your company?
faqs.a: To apply, submit your resume and details through our careers page or the contact form on our website — our talent team will take it from there.

faqs.q: Do you have internships or entry-level positions available?
faqs.a: Yes. We offer internships and entry-level positions for those just starting their careers. These roles provide valuable experience and the opportunity to learn from experienced professionals.

faqs.q: What is the hiring process like at your company?
faqs.a: Our hiring process typically includes submitting an application, a phone or video interview, and potentially an in-person interview. If a job offer is made, we'll guide you through the next steps.

faqs.q: Is your company diverse and inclusive?
faqs.a: Diversity and inclusivity are important values at Synergy. We are committed to building a team that represents a wide range of backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences.
